title: [merge-conflict] worktree-worker18: coap_status.c
close_reason: Fixed map_count=6 in encode_status_cbor to match CBOR structure with capacity key (uptime+mem+time+dodag+radio+capacity=6 base + batteries); cleaned leading whitespace on routes encoder; resolved merge divergence from worker18 branch. Rust oracle tests and CBOR roundtrip now match. No dead code added.
